meaning: adj.十进的,小数的,以十为基础的,十进制n.小数
examples: The figure is accurate to two decimal places.
The number is correct to three decimal places.
A waiter omitted the decimal point in the $13.09 bill.
But then, why quibble over what amounts to little more than an innocently misplaced decimal point?
"In one case it looks like someone just put the decimal point in the wrong place!"
